type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Change in reported value for this substance is attributed to an improvement in the internal tracking system at the facility.

The upgrade allows for the automated search of all speciated VOCs in all on-Site products. By entering product usage amounts, substance amount can now be quickly and easily quantified. Products that were not previously accounted for are now captured.
